anchor.text: REPLACE ME — describe how this UI should look, or set anchor.path to a design doc. Without an anchor the verdict is 'unable_to_judge'.

setup.notes: OPTIONAL — delete if your app's dev server is already running. If your UI has NO URL (e.g. a VS Code extension webview), serve a preview harness here and point routes at its URLs, e.g. command: 'npm run preview:webview', readyUrl: 'http://localhost:5174/'.
